rulings.Case Title: EVENECEL VILLANUEVA et al VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Defendants To Plaintiffs' Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 26, 2013, line 13. Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Defendants To Plaintiffs' Third Amended Complaint Sustained with leave to amend to address issues raised in demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALAN HONNIBALL VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 26, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY N.A., JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A., U.S. BANK , N.A., TRUSTEE FOR JPMAC 2005 WMC LLP, AND JPMORGAN MORGAGE ACQUISITION CORP, 2005-WMC1'S, DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT Pages 16 & 17 of plaintiff's opposition stricken see CRC 3.1113(d). Demurrer sustained with leave to amend causes of action 1-3, to allege tender. Sustained without leave to amend causes of action 4 and 6, statute of limitation not addressed; causes of action 5 and 7, no opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID MICHAEL WOODS VS. BRUCE C. DELUNA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 26, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF DAVID WOODS' DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT Overruled - General and special demurrer to answer not unintelligible and demurrer is without merit. = (501/REQ)
